scripts.test:fixtures: bun packages/cli/src/bin.ts test examples/hook-test && bun packages/cli/src/bin.ts test examples/eject-test && bun packages/cli/src/bin.ts test examples/sengoku-raid
scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:fixtures && bun run test:validate-negative
scripts.typecheck: bunx tsc -p packages/engine/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/parser/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/studio/tsconfig.json --noEmit
